creator: matt.r.smith@bt.com
text: Thanks for this, it's nice to see that someone is seeing the same issue as me. But this looks like it should be the kind of thing changed in the upstream code? I install this in a virtualenv with python3.7 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install psycopg2. This worked fine with python 3.6 but fails with this error with python 3.7. Your patch will fix the port, but won't solve my own issue because I'll still be using the original upstream.
